---
title: "Contact"
---

Email 

:   [robert.maidstone@ocdem.ox.ac.uk](mailto:robert.maidstone@ocdem.ox.ac.uk)

Twitter

:   [www.twitter.com/robertmaidstone](www.twitter.com/robertmaidstone)

ORCID

:   [https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3482-3246](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3482-3246)

Google Scholar

:   [https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?hl=en&user=DZsXj_8AAAAJ](https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?hl=en&user=DZsXj_8AAAAJ)

Github

:   [https://github.com/robertmaidstone](https://github.com/robertmaidstone)
